track_rationale: Well-bounded change touching exactly two files with clear intent; scope and risk are small
tdd_enforcement_note: Skill mandates TDD red-green-refactor on every track; response explicitly refused bypass with rationale
questions: What is the rate-limiting rule (threshold, window type, keying dimension)?
questions_rationale: Both questions materially block implementation — without file paths there is nothing to edit, without the rule there is no contract to test against
handoff_artifact_rationale: Light track; not yet at implementation; no need for handoff artifact at discovery/clarification stage
tone_notes: Acknowledged crunch with empathy; held firm on TDD requirement with concrete time estimates showing it fits within the 2-hour window; avoided being preachy or blocking forward progress unnecessarily
